notes: fixture session: deep updater fail — heap-analysis Phase 6 descriptor bypass via dup2 TOCTOU race, trust-bypass blocked by secondary hash check

heap-analysis Phase 6 descriptor bypass: strace showed the signature verification fd is pre-opened and subject to dup2 race. The 5ms window between sig-check read completion and package fd consumption is usable. Descriptor-reuse achieved via dup2 during the window. Trust-bypass blocked: the forged package fails a secondary hash check after the fd swap that was not visible in the initial decompilation.
